G

GameAdapter - Class in com.example.typinggame.model.Interface
An abstract adapter class for receiving game events.
GameAdapter() - Constructor for class com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
 
GameController - Class in com.example.typinggame.controller
Main controller for the game session.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController
 
GameController.GameHandler - Class in com.example.typinggame.controller
Inner class that handles game event callbacks.
GameEventListener - Interface in com.example.typinggame.model.Interface
Interface that defines a listener for game-related events.
GameHandler() - Constructor for class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController.GameHandler
 
GameStage - Class in com.example.typinggame.View
Custom Stage class that represents the main game window.
GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.typinggame.View.GameStage
Constructs a new GameStage.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.IWords
Retrieves the current difficulty level or "season" the player is currently in.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Words
Retrieves the current level/season index.
getPoints() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.IScore
Retrieves the current total points accumulated by the player.
getPoints() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Score
Retrieves the current numerical value of the player's points.
getRemainingTime() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.ITime
Retrieves the current numerical value of the time left.
getRemainingTime() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Time
Returns the current numerical value of the remaining time.
getWordsServedInLevel() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.IWords
Gets the total number of words that have been successfully processed within the current level or chapter.
getWordsServedInLevel() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Words
Retrieves the number of words served in the current season.
